text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 171 

PART_D_LIPS_50 

LABEL: Part D Low Income Premium Subsidy 50% 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the monthly Part D low-income total premium subsidy (LIPS) for 
beneficiaries at the 50% subsidized level. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank after 2023.
